race.comment: The well-bred CRYOSEISMS (7) (dam was a G1 winner) has looked good since joining the new stable, winning three of four this campaign and should get a cosy run in transit from gate three. Expected to go very close again. DON'T TOUCH (9) has won four of five career starts, draws low and gets 2kg weight relief with the claim. Ticks a few boxes for a race like this. KRACKACAN (2) is yet to miss the top-five in 11 career outings and is a model of consistency. In the mix. OVER DRAFT (6) draws the inside marble and will be ready to peak now fourth run in. Can trouble the judge. WOLFGANG (4) next best in a race decimated by scratchings.
